grounding.debt_stock: ≈ 0.1 extra years of the FY2025 federal deficit — an improvement against what CBO projects
grounding.fed_deficit_flow: ≈ 1.5× the annual NIH budget, every year — an improvement against what CBO projects
grounding.real_gdp: ≈ 1.5 years of normal (~2%/yr) real growth, arriving all at once
grounding.state_flow: ≈ 0.1× the annual NIH budget, every year
